title: 2 Yards (1.82 metres) White, Blue & Pink Baby Footprints Grosgrain Ribbon 22mm Wide, Ideal for Craft Projects, Scrapbooking, DIY Hair Bows, Present Wrapping etc.
features: White, Blue & Pink Baby Footprints Grosgrain Ribbon 22mm Wide
Perfect for Craft Projects, scrapbooking, millinery, DIY Bows, card making etc.
Reverse of Ribbon is plain, non printed.
2 Yards (1.82 metres) supplied with extra ribbon provided to account for edge fraying.
